title: lactuca depressa
intro: Lactuca depressa, also known as prickly lettuce, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. Its health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and aiding in the treatment of insomnia and restlessness. Lactuca depressa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
